title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Charge Case
scenario: Verify the Software Update tab displays correct content when only the Charge Case has an available update.
steps: Start the app with Osprey and there is an update only for the Charge Case (CC is on at least 5039, EB is on the latest version).
expected: Earbuds are marked as up to date; Charge Case shows current/available version, release notes, and an Update button.
